Resources

A collection of various helpful resources

Webmaster resources

  • petrapixel's coding tutorials and resources - Amazing resource for webmasters on Neocities/the personal web

  • Resources List for the Personal Web - Masterlist resource for the personal web by 32-bit cafe

  • Sparrow's Guide to Accessible Webmastery - Guides and resources to make your website more accessible!

  • HTML Cheat Sheet - an HTML cheatsheet

  • sadgrlonline - webmaster resources from sadgrl

Online reference libraries for artists

  • Line of Action - reference photos and practice tools for visual artists including figure drawing, animal drawing, scenes & environment drawing, and more.
    • Support the creator
  • Afro Index- A Reference Library for Black Hairstyles
    • Support the creator
  • Posemaniacs- free 3d anatomy + pose reference library
  • x6ud.github.io/#/- Find animal reference photos based on skull angle
    • Support the creator here
  • x6ud.github.io/pose-search- Find pose reference photos based on poseable skeleton
    • Support the creator here
  • FilmGrab- large film reference library of movie stills

    • Support the creator here

Useful software for artists

  • pureref- program available for Windows, Mac and Linux that helps view and organize reference images on your desktop. Free if you set the contribution price to $0 at checkout

    • Support the creators here

  • Libresprite - Free and Open Source pixel art program available for Windows, Mac and Linux. Fork of Aseprite.

Online resources and tools for artists

  • labisa- Resource and starting point for understanding accurate SWANA (South West Asian/North African) fashion and how Orientalism erases the true beauty of cultural costumes from SWANA regions.
  • Coolors.co- color palette generator
  • Lospec- tutorials, palette lists, gallery, tools and resources for mainly pixel art and other low-spec forms of art

    • Support the creator here

For Your Information

  • Decolonize Palestine - A collection of resources for organizers and anyone who wants to learn more about Palestine.

  • findhelp.org - (US only) Get connected to resources for various needs like food, housing, medical, education,work, and more.

  • bank.green - this website checks whether your bank is funding fossil fuels and has a filterable list of recommended green/ sustainable banks that you can switch to. Personally, I made the switch to Walden Bank for online banking.

Useful Sites

  • Triangle Relationship Generator - Build character relationship charts for anime, manga, drama, fanfic, class rosters, org charts, and social graphs.
    • Support the creator
  • ToWebP.app- Convert images to WebP file format fast and privately online
    • Support the creator here

dv9l / 2026
